tests.name: test_final_state.py::test_output_exists
tests.trace:
@pytest.fixture(scope="session", autouse=True)
    def setup_and_run_dataflow():
        # Setup
        if os.path.exists(OUTPUT_JSONL):
            os.remove(OUTPUT_JSONL)
    
        with open(INPUT_CSV, "w") as f:
            f.write(CSV_CONTENT)
    
        # Run the Dataflow
        result = subprocess.run(
            ["python", "run.py", "--input", "input.csv", "--output", "output.jsonl"],
            cwd=PROJECT_DIR,
            capture_output=True,
            text=True
        )
>       assert result.returncode == 0, f"Dataflow execution failed: {result.stderr}"
E       AssertionError: Dataflow execution failed: python: can't open file '/home/user/myproject/run.py': [Errno 2] No such file or directory
E         
E       assert 2 == 0
E        +  where 2 = CompletedProcess(args=['python', 'run.py', '--input', 'input.csv', '--output', 'output.jsonl'], returncode=2, stdout='', stderr="python: can't open file '/home/user/myproject/run.py': [Errno 2] No such file or directory\n").returncode

tests/test_final_state.py:37: AssertionError
